patch.value: Context relevance scorer contract: pluggable SDK weighting, deterministic default model, and extension override path
Define the public SDK scorer interface and default deterministic weighting model for pm context and pm next ranking.

SDK exports a documented scoreContextCandidates-style contract; default scorer combines all available signal families with deterministic tie-breaking; extension or package code can replace or wrap the scorer; CLI, MCP, and SDK consume the same scorer; golden tests prove small-workspace ordering stays stable when advanced signals are absent.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate check: searched all statuses for context relevance scorer/plugin/weighting; no child item existed under pm-4k6b, only the broad parent and closed search relevance items.
